title: No falling blocks
description: This plugin stops falling blocks from spawning when you interact with a block like sand.
body:
## No Falling Blocks Plugin

No Falling Blocks is a Minecraft plugin that stops falling blocks from spawning naturally when you interact with a block like sand, gravel, or concrete. This plugin is useful for players who want to gather resources more efficiently without relying on the falling block duplication mechanic.

### Features

- Prevents falling blocks from spawning naturally when you interact with a block like sand, gravel, or concrete.
- Allows players to still spawn falling blocks manually.
- Compatible with Minecraft servers running Spigot and Paper forks.

### Installation

To install No Falling Blocks on your Minecraft server, follow these steps:

1. Download the No Falling Blocks plugin from Modrinth.
2. Place the downloaded .jar file into your server's plugins folder.
3. Restart or reload/enable your server.
